terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.effectiveDate: These Terms of Service are valid and effective from January 1, 2026.
terms.s1p1: These Terms of Service (hereinafter "Terms") govern the rights and obligations between AUTOMYČKA KARLÍN, with registered office at Sokolovská 694/98, 186 00 Prague 8 – Karlín, ID: 12345678 (hereinafter "Provider"), and the customer (hereinafter "Customer") when using car washing, cleaning, and detailing services.
terms.s1p2: By ordering a service or making a reservation, the Customer confirms that they have read and agree to these Terms.
terms.s2p1: Services can be reserved in the following ways:
terms.s2l1: Online via the booking system on the website.
terms.s2p2: The reservation is binding upon confirmation by the Provider. Confirmation is sent by email or SMS to the contact details provided by the Customer.
terms.s2p3: The Customer is obliged to arrive at the premises at the reserved time. In case of a delay longer than 15 minutes, the Provider reserves the right to cancel the reservation.
terms.s3p1: All prices are quoted in Czech Koruna (CZK) including VAT. The current price list is available on the website and at the premises.
terms.s3p2: The final price of the service may be adjusted depending on the actual condition and level of soiling of the vehicle, about which the Customer will be informed before the service begins.
terms.s3p3: Payment can be made in the following ways:
terms.s3l1: By payment card (Visa, Mastercard) – at the premises and online.
terms.s3l3: By bank transfer – for corporate customers based on an invoice.
terms.s4p1: The Customer may cancel or modify the reservation free of charge no later than 24 hours before the scheduled service time.
terms.s4p2: In case of cancellation less than 24 hours before the scheduled time, the Provider reserves the right to charge a cancellation fee of 50% of the ordered service price.
terms.s4p3: In case of repeated no-shows without prior cancellation, the Provider reserves the right to require a deposit from the Customer for future reservations.
terms.s5p1: The Provider is liable for damages demonstrably caused by their fault during the provision of services. The Customer is obliged to report any damage immediately upon receipt of the vehicle, but no later than within 24 hours.
terms.s5p2: The Provider is not liable for:
terms.s5l1: Damage caused by hidden defects of the vehicle (loose parts, damaged paint, etc.).
terms.s5l2: Items left in the vehicle during the provision of services.
terms.s5l3: Damage resulting from the Customer's failure to follow the Provider's instructions.
terms.s6p1: The Customer has the right to complain about the quality of the provided service. The complaint must be made immediately upon receipt of the vehicle or no later than 24 hours after completion of the service.
terms.s6p3: The Provider will assess and resolve the complaint within 30 days of receipt. In case of a valid complaint, the Provider will arrange a free repeat of the service or a refund of the corresponding portion of the price.
terms.s7p1: Information about personal data processing is provided in a separate document <link>Privacy Policy</link>, which is an integral part of these Terms.
terms.s8p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Czech Republic, in particular Act No. 89/2012 Coll., the Civil Code, as amended.
terms.s8p2: The Provider reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time. The current version of the Terms is always available on the Provider's website.
terms.s8p3: Any disputes will be resolved primarily out of court. If no agreement is reached, the competent court is the court in Prague.
terms.s8p4: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, this shall not affect the validity and enforceability of the remaining provisions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.effectiveDate: This Privacy Policy is valid and effective from January 1, 2026.
privacy.s1p1: AUTOMYČKA KARLÍN (hereinafter "Controller") values your trust and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when using our services, website, and booking system.
privacy.s1p2: Personal data processing is carried out in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), and applicable laws of the Czech Republic.
privacy.s2p1: The controller of your personal data is:
privacy.s3p1: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.s3l1: Reservations and orders – processing car wash and detailing reservations, order management, and communication regarding provided services.
privacy.s3l2: Sending newsletters – informing about news, promotions, and special offers (only with your consent).
privacy.s3l3: Improving services – analyzing customer preferences and optimizing the service offering and user experience on the website.
privacy.s3l4: Legal obligations – fulfilling tax, accounting, and other legal obligations.
privacy.s3l5: Communication – responding to your inquiries and requests via the contact form, email, or phone.
privacy.s4p1: We process personal data based on the following legal grounds:
privacy.s4l1: Performance of contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) – processing is necessary for the performance of the service agreement to which you are a party.
privacy.s4l2: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) – for sending marketing communications and newsletters. You may withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.s4l3: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) – improving services and protecting our legitimate interests.
privacy.s4l4: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR) – fulfilling obligations arising from legislation.
privacy.s5p1: We retain your personal data only for the period necessary to fulfill the purpose of processing:
privacy.s5l1: Reservation and order data – for the duration of the contractual relationship and subsequently 3 years for potential complaints.
privacy.s5l2: Accounting and tax documents – 10 years as required by law.
privacy.s5l4: Contact form data – 1 year from the last contact.
privacy.s6p1: Your personal data may be shared with the following third parties:
privacy.s6l1: Altegio – operator of the booking system that provides technical management of reservations.
privacy.s6l2: Payment processors – card payment processors for secure payment transactions.
privacy.s6l3: Accountants and tax advisors – for fulfilling legal obligations.
privacy.s6l4: IT service providers – hosting, website management, and email communication.
privacy.s6p2: We do not transfer your data to third countries outside the European Economic Area without appropriate safeguards.
privacy.s7p1: In connection with personal data processing, you have the following rights:
privacy.s7l1: Right of access – you have the right to obtain confirmation as to whether your personal data is being processed, and if so, to access it.
privacy.s7l2: Right to rectification – you have the right to request correction of inaccurate or completion of incomplete personal data.
privacy.s7l3: Right to erasure – you have the right to request deletion of your personal data if there is no legal reason for processing.
privacy.s7l4: Right to data portability – you have the right to receive personal data you have provided to us in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.s7l5: Right to object – you have the right to object to the processing of personal data based on legitimate interest.
privacy.s7l6: Right to restriction of processing – you have the right to request restriction of personal data processing.
privacy.s7l7: Right to withdraw consent – if processing is based on consent, you have the right to withdraw that consent at any time.
privacy.s7p2: You can exercise your rights by sending a request to automyckakarlin@email.cz. You also have the right to file a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection (ÚOOÚ).
privacy.s8p1: Our website uses cookies to ensure proper functionality, analyze traffic, and personalize content. Cookies are small text files stored in your browser.
privacy.s8p2: We use the following types of cookies:
privacy.s8l1: Necessary cookies – ensure basic website functionality and cannot be deactivated.
privacy.s8l2: Analytical cookies – help us understand how visitors use the website.
privacy.s8l3: Marketing cookies – used to display relevant advertising messages.
privacy.s8p3: You can change your cookie settings at any time in your browser settings.
privacy.s9p1: If you have any questions regarding the processing of your personal data, please do not hesitate to contact us:
